rows.title: Provider comment fallback through system browser

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The provider can observe the review comment target and actor scope; raw local workspace content is not exported by the matrix.

approval.reapproval_summary: Comment publish must reapprove when target, provider scope, policy epoch, privacy consequence, or ticket freshness changes.

handoff.handoff_summary: System browser opens only from a typed packet and returns to the review anchor.

origin.traffic_origin_label: Desktop review workspace through signed mirror

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The mirror and provider can observe the merge target and acting account; stale mirror truth blocks green claim until step-up resolves.

approval.reapproval_summary: Approval can be reused only while target, mirror host, policy epoch, provider scope, and privacy consequence remain unchanged and fresh.

handoff.handoff_summary: Step-up opens the system browser from a typed packet and returns to merge readiness.

rows.title: Offline release publish parks in publish-later

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: Publish is parked locally because only an imported snapshot is available; no provider mutation is implied until the queued item revalidates.

approval.reapproval_summary: Publish-later cannot reuse offline approval after provider target, policy, scope, privacy consequence, or freshness changes.

handoff.handoff_summary: No browser opens; the local queue preserves intent until a live publish route is reapproved.

rows.title: Managed CI mutation narrows to copy/export evidence

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: Managed policy narrows mutation to metadata-only evidence export; no raw logs or provider payloads are exported.

approval.reapproval_summary: The managed approval may be reused only for the same target, trust posture, policy epoch, and metadata-only privacy consequence.

handoff.handoff_summary: No browser opens; diagnostics and support export carry the narrowed evidence row.

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The preview can be visible through the tunnel scope; support exports carry the tunnel handle class and never the raw endpoint.

approval.reapproval_summary: Tunnel exposure can reuse approval until expiry only when target, host, policy, and exposure class stay fixed.

handoff.handoff_summary: In-product preview remains primary; system browser fallback is packeted and labeled as tunnel exposure.

rows.title: Notebook preview hands native-depth work to desktop

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: Notebook preview context is visible to the companion until the desktop admits the kernel/source workflow.

approval.reapproval_summary: Desktop kernel or source mutation is reapproved after any target, trust, policy, or privacy consequence change.

handoff.handoff_summary: Companion remains preview-only and hands native-depth actions to desktop command review.

rows.title: Voice command review routes privileged action to desktop

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The recognized command and target scope are recorded for review; raw dictation buffers remain outside support export.

approval.reapproval_summary: Privileged voice actions are reapproved for each launch and every target/trust/policy/privacy drift.

handoff.handoff_summary: Voice never bypasses native desktop review for privileged actions.

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The companion can inspect scoped review/light-edit state, but native-depth authority stays on desktop.

approval.reapproval_summary: Any move from companion inspect/light-edit into native-depth desktop authority forces desktop review.

handoff.handoff_summary: Companion surfaces never grant terminal/debugger/local filesystem parity; desktop receives the typed packet.

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The embedded preview can show runtime state; source mutation and device management route to desktop review.

approval.reapproval_summary: Preview runtime context cannot reuse approval for source mutation after target, trust, policy, or exposure drift.

handoff.handoff_summary: Embedded runtime remains a bounded preview; desktop review owns source-depth mutation.

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The system browser receives docs/help destination context only; support export carries source/version/freshness metadata.

approval.reapproval_summary: External-open approval is reusable only while the docs destination host, policy, and privacy consequence stay fixed.

handoff.handoff_summary: Docs/help external open is packeted so embedded content cannot impersonate product-native chrome.

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: The provider callback can confirm auth state; raw callback bodies and tokens never enter the matrix or support export.

approval.reapproval_summary: Callback return is accepted only when origin, host/domain, target scope, policy epoch, and provider scope match the interstitial.

handoff.handoff_summary: System-browser auth returns through a native callback target validated against the typed handoff packet.

rows.title: Provider webhook return validates origin before mutation

exposure.privacy_consequence_summary: Inbound provider callback metadata is visible to the provider and must match the original target before any mutation drains.

approval.reapproval_summary: Webhook return never reuses approval if callback target, host, scope, policy, or privacy consequence drifted.

handoff.handoff_summary: Callback is denied or drained only through the packet's original route and target context.
